title: RBI Responsible Business Conduct (Second Amendment) Directions, 2026
source_url: Direct URL not accessible through search
description: Effective July 1, 2026, these amended directions strengthen borrower protections with mandatory recovery agent certification, defined contact windows (8 AM - 7 PM), and enhanced grievance-escalation protocols. Recovery agents must hold valid training credentials from RBI-recognised programmes, and use of coercive/abusive practices carries explicit supervisory consequences.
